text.title: JVM One-Tag Release via JReleaser Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Engineer publishes from laptop; signing inconsistent; sometimes fails.
antipattern.root-cause: Release ritual is bespoke per engineer.
antipattern.fix: Move to tag-triggered JReleaser; revoke central deploy creds from individuals.

antipattern.symptom: GPG key passphrase committed to jreleaser.yml.
Release has empty changelog because no conventional commits.
antipattern.fix: Add commitlint pre-commit hook; reject non-conventional commits.
